narrative:
Monday Creek Townshp township has 488 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.2 percentage points.
